subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ashraf
subcodes.first_line: O Ashraf, listen carefully to what the Tongue of the Eternal has to say. Any one of the melodies of your Lord would be sufficient to attract the hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اشرف اسمع ما یلقیک لسان القدم و لاتکن من الغافلین و ان استماع نغمه من نغمات
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
